description_long: This nightstand is crafted from light-colored wood with a smooth, matte finish, featuring a rectangular tabletop and a unique asymmetrical design. The left side of the tabletop is wider, while the right side is narrower and extends downward to form a box-like compartment. The nightstand stands on four tapered wooden legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The upper section includes a hinged back panel, likely serving as a lid or mirror support, suggesting a dual function as a vanity. There are no visible handles on the drawers, indicating a minimalist, handle-less design. The overall construction appears sturdy and functional, suitable for both storage and display purposes.
description: A light wood nightstand with a hinged back panel, asymmetrical design, and tapered legs, featuring a minimalist, handle-less drawer style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hinged back panel, asymmetrical tabletop, and both left and right compartments with tapered legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop, the depth of the compartment, and the profile of the hinged back panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back of the hinged panel and the symmetrical alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the narrow compartment and the side profile of the hinged back panel.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
